20:47 â November 17, 2020
Update to Bill Payments Remittance Processing (BPRP) Forms
We are in the process of updating our Bill Payment Remittance Processing (BPRP) documentation. We are initially publishing changes to the following forms:
Application for Bill Payment Remittance Processing (BPRP), Form 2482
Bill Payment Remittance Processing Data Files â Flat File Specifications, Form 2665
Bill Payment Remittance Processing Data Files â EDI File Specification, Form 2667
Updates to other content will follow.
Document Library
Status
Application for Bill Payment Remittance Processing (BPRP)
2482
We updated and reorganized the form as follows:
â¢
Added a Lead Central section. Applies only to other provincial centrals.
â¢
Removed the Fax Number field and expanded the Email field in the Financial Institution Information section.
â¢
Consolidated and reorganized all biller information to the Billers Information section. Added a Billerâs French Trade Name field.
â¢
Moved the biller contact fields to a separate Contact Information section and added fields to indicate if the contact is for enrollment, tracing, or both.
â¢
Moved the categories to a Category Type section.
â¢
Moved the Account Validation Rules to an Account Validation Rules section. Updated the requirement for valid sample account numbers from six to ten.
â¢
Added Provincial Central Letter of Direction, Form 9215, to the Additional Mandatory Documents section. Applies only to other provincial centrals.
â¢
Added an Authorization to Disclose Biller Information Section.
â¢
Added a credit Union Central Authorization section. Applies only to other provincial centrals.
Revised
Bill Payment Remittance Processing Data Files â Flat File Specifications
2665
We removed all references to paper processing as it is no longer offered.
Revised
Bill Payment Remittance Processing Data Files â EDI File Specifications
2667
We removed all references to paper processing as it is no longer offered.
Revised
